title: Summer Garden Pasta

Marinade: 18 large basil leaves, julienned, plus extra for serving
Pasta: Splash of olive oil (for pasta water)
Finishing: 1 1/2 cups freshly grated Parmesan cheese, plus extra for serving

steps: Combine the cherry tomatoes, 1/2 cup olive oil, garlic, julienned basil leaves, red pepper flakes, 1 teaspoon salt, and black pepper in a large bowl.
Cover with plastic wrap and set aside at room temperature for about 4 hours to marinate.
Just before serving, bring a large pot of water to a boil with a splash of olive oil and 2 tablespoons salt.
Add the angel hair pasta and cook al dente according to package directions — only 2 to 3 minutes. Watch closely.
Drain the pasta well and add it to the bowl with the marinated tomatoes.
Add the Parmesan cheese and some extra fresh basil leaves.
Toss well until everything is evenly coated.
Serve in big bowls with extra cheese on each serving.
